'''Shek Barayel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Indu]] serving as chief [[Councillor/Legends|councillor]] on the [[Indu Council]]. He was murdered in an attempt by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] loyalists to frame the New Republic and bring the Empire (and its [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]) back to [[Indu San/Legends|Indu San]].<ref name="FF" />

During a vote covering an alliance between the [[Indu San system/Legends|Indu San system]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Barayel was assassinated by [[Council Authority]] [[Authority Officer|Officer]] [[Kaleb Darme]]. Darme had inconspicuously planted a bomb in Barayel's comm and voter panel at the council's U-shaped conference table. Darme was brought to justice by [[Galactic News Network|GNN]] reporter [[Kella Rand]], who unknowingly caught his actions on [[Cam droid/Legends|hover-cam]] during an interview with Barayel's [[Aide/Legends|aide]], [[Tev Aden]].<ref name="FF" />
